controls.title: No-wait job pipeline
controls.description: PR/CI/Merge/Release operations run as job+poll without blocking ticks.

controls.title: Token redaction
controls.description: Auth tokens are never logged; only presence flags are recorded.

controls.title: Network policy default OFF
controls.description: Network use is gated by policy and disabled by default.

controls.title: Merge criteria evidencing
controls.description: Merge actions require deterministic evidence in workspace reports.
